wins.event: Q4 revenue $10.3B record, +34% YoY; net income $2.5B record (+42%); FCF $2.1B nearly doubled
FY 2025 revenue $34.6B (+34% YoY); Data Center FY +nearly doubled
Q4 Data Center $5.4B record, +39% YoY; 8 of top 10 AI companies use Instinct
Long-range targets reaffirmed: >35% revenue CAGR over 3-5y, EPS >$20 in strategic timeframe
Embedded $17B design wins in 2025 (+20% YoY); $50B cumulative since Xilinx acquisition

risks.event: 2026 semi-custom annual revenue expected to decline by significant double-digit percentage (7th year of console cycle)
Helios / MI400 launch in 2026 carries execution risk on production ramp at scale
Data Center AI revenue concentration with OpenAI 6GW deployment is large single-customer exposure

guidance.notes: Data Center segment revenue expected to grow >60% annually over next 3-5 years; AI business on path to tens of billions in annual revenue in 2027. Long-range targets from FAD reaffirmed.

_notes: Year-end capstone: '2025 was a defining year for AMD'. Peak CEO confidence. Multi-year demand super cycle thesis. Semi-custom decline is the only material counter.
